name: Veal Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil over medium heat for about 2 minutes.
2. Add diced onion and minced Jalepeno Pepper, cooking until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
3. Add ground veal to the pan and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Stir in canned tomatoes with juice, tomato sauce, chili powder, dry mustard, salt, pepper, basil, oregano, kidney beans, parsley, white wine, and lemon juice.
5. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Cook the chili for an additional 15 minutes until flavors are well combined.
